blockers.description: Android Gradle wrapper download timeout - Gradle 8.9 not downloading from services.gradle.org
blockers.workaround: Use Android Studio to download Gradle automatically, or use local Gradle 8.7 at ~/.gradle/wrapper/dists/

blockers.description: Phase 57 blocked - Vercel CLI needs authentication (vercel login)
blockers.workaround: User needs to run 'vercel login' in terminal

blockers.description: Phase 59 iOS App Store submission - needs manual Xcode archive and upload
blockers.workaround: User needs to open Xcode, archive, and upload to App Store Connect

blockers.description: Phase 60 Android Play Store - AAB build blocked on Java/AGP compatibility
blockers.workaround: Fix Java version or AGP version compatibility

human_actions_pending.action: Run 'vercel login && vercel --prod' in web directory

decisions.rationale: Attempt to fix download timeout issues

decisions.decision: Hilt plugin version changed from 2.50.0 to 2.48.1

next_action: Complete Phase 56 Android build fixes - either use Android Studio to download Gradle automatically, or manually place Gradle 8.9 in ~/.gradle/wrapper/dists/. Then proceed to Phase 57 (Vercel login needed), Phase 59 (Xcode manual steps), Phase 60 (fix AAB build).
context_notes: M010 Ship to Production milestone - 11/64 phases complete (17%). Phase 56 Android build fixes in progress but blocked on Gradle download timeout. Multiple phases blocked waiting for manual user actions (Vercel login, Xcode archive). Phase 61 E2E testing blocked until 59-60 complete. Cron job 73fc38ca was created for progress monitoring every 2 minutes.
